will come out of its mother's womb with its legs foremost, if
the ascendant-lord be in the 10th and Rahu in the Lagna.
(2) If the lords of V and IV be posited in II and VII and be
aspected or joined by malefics, and if a male planet be in a male
decanate, the creatures born would be monkeys,, pigs, cats and
the like.
(3) If all the malefics be very strong and benefics weak, and if
a neutral planet (Mercury or Saturn) be posited in or aspecting
a quadrant, there would be birth of a being similar in form to the
one shown by the Moon's Dvadasamsa, provided that Amla
belongs to a ViyonifSub-human) Sign.
(4) If malefics be strong and posited in their own Dvadasamsas,
and benefics being weak be in the 1/12 Amsas belonging to
others, similar deductions should be arrived at, provided the
ascendant is a Viyoni sign.
